fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases retain exact face counts. Curve resampling now carries Blender's original float32 segment/factor into tangent and normal interpolation, Curve to Points uses Blender 5.1's canonical float32 matrix-to-quaternion conversion, and Align Rotation to Vector follows Blender's high-precision-cross axis-angle AUTO-pivot path. The maximum post-align quaternion-component error is 1.42e-7. Before the 1e-5 Merge by Distance, topology is exact at 16,567 vertices / 11,199 faces; position error is at most 0.0001088 units with 0.00000131 RMS, down from 0.00805 / 0.0000875. Edited text is topology-exact; authored and peak-height cases are -1 vertex, line thickness is +2, and subdivide 12 is -5. Authored bounds now differ by at most 0.0153 units and the five-case maximum is 0.0634, down from 0.1106. The remaining vertex-only residual is localized to eleven pairs on opposite sides of the threshold weld, not Merge by Distance semantics.
